candidate_definitions.text: A completion plugin for neovim coded in Lua.

Automatically format your Java files using [Google Java Style guidelines](https://google.github.io/styleguide/javaguide.html).
A Neovim configuration for the advanced martian hacker
A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm
A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm
A local AI chat app powered by 🦀 Rust, 🧊 iced, 🤗 Hugging Face, and 🦙 llama.cpp
Run, manage, and scale AI workloads on any AI infrastructure. Use one system to access & manage all AI compute (Kubernetes, Slurm, 20+ clouds, on-prem).
A royal collection of exquisite widgets and helpers to rule your iced kingdom
🎨 Atom's iconic One Dark theme. Cacheable, fully customisable, Tree-sitter and LSP semantic token support. Comes with variants

Build Better Websites. Create modern, resilient user experiences with web fundamentals.

Pipecat example applications. Use and learn from these patterns to build your own voice AI applications.
Unicode-based scientific plotting for working in the terminal
Powerful convenience for Julia visualizations and data analysis
Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
C++ and Python library for farm-ng logging format
2d and 3d geometry for Computer Vision and Robotics
A low-level, lightweight protocol buffers implementation in JavaScript.
The Citation File Format lets you provide citation metadata for software or datasets in plaintext files that are easy to read by both humans and machines.
A JSON tree view component that is easy to use and also supports data selection.
Another Emacs Org-mode and Markdown parser.

Internet-scale OpenID Certified™ OpenID Connect and OAuth2.1 provider that integrates with your user management through headless APIs. Solve OIDC/OAuth2 user cases over night. Consume as a service on Ory Network or self-host. Trusted by OpenAI and many others for scale and security. Written in Go.

The most scalable and customizable permission server on the market. Fix your slow or broken permission system with Google's proven "Zanzibar" approach. Supports ACL, RBAC, and more. Written in Go, cloud native, headless, API-first. Available as a service on Ory Network and for self-hosters.

Headless cloud-native authentication and identity management written in Go. Scales to a billion+ users. Replace Homegrown, Auth0, Okta, Firebase with better UX and DX. Passkeys, Social Sign In, OIDC, Magic Link, Multi-Factor Auth, SMS, SAML, TOTP, and more. Runs everywhere, runs best on Ory Network.

A cloud native Identity & Access Proxy / API (IAP) and Access Control Decision API that authenticates, authorizes, and mutates incoming HTTP(s) requests. Inspired by the BeyondCorp / Zero Trust white paper. Written in Go.
💭👀precognition.nvim - Precognition uses virtual text and gutter signs to show available motions.
This is an ExpressJS reference implementation for the Ory Hydra User Login and Consent interface written in TypeScript and ExpressJS.
Vue 2/3 isomorphic JSON editor, viewer, formatter and validator.
Write better integration tests! Dockertest helps you boot up ephermal docker images for your Go tests with minimal work.
Kubernetes Helm Charts for the ORY ecosystem.
Generate JSON Schema documents from Swift
Graph-related recipes to be used with Plots.jl
Strongly typed MCP tools in Swift
A library for turning nebulous data into well-structured data, with a focus on composition, performance, generality, and ergonomics.
A bidirectional router with more type safety and less fuss.
